title: Popovers (Regular or Gluten-free)
ingredients: 4 large eggs (room temperature or warmed in shallow bowl of warm water for 10 minutes)
1½ cups flour (if gluten free, use 1 cup 1:1 GF flour and ½ cup rice flour)
instructions: Place all ingredients except butter in a blender.
Add butter and blend a few seconds.
Place mixture in well oiled popover pan.
For steam oven: bake at Convection Steam setting 425°F for 20 minutes, then reduce to 325°F for 12 minutes.
For regular oven: bake at 450°F for 20 minutes, then reduce heat to 350°F and bake 10-15 minutes more.
Remove from oven and immediately take popovers out of the pan.
Place a small slit in bottom of popovers to release steam and prevent them from collapsing.
Serve immediately with good butter, jam, or honey.
notes: Eggs can be warmed in a shallow bowl of warm water for 10 minutes before using
For gluten-free version, substitute the 1½ cups flour with 1 cup 1:1 gluten-free flour and ½ cup rice flour
Make sure to oil the popover pan well
Serve immediately after removing from oven
